public_reputation: Judicial-administrative officer who manages filings, warrants, and court throughput inside Roazian authority spaces.
manner: Carries the habits of a clerk-magistrate whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Ithtananalor.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of clerk-magistrate in and around Ithtananalor, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ithtananalor workable through the obligations of clerk-magistrate while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of clerk-magistrate credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Ithtananalor.

adventure_hooks.summary: Clerk-Magistrate Helvar Sorn can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Ithtananalor.
Clerk-Magistrate Helvar Sorn becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a clerk-magistrate.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Clerk-Magistrate Helvar Sorn is readable as a clerk-magistrate tied to Ithtananalor.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ithtananalor: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Clerk-Magistrate Helvar Sorn presents as someone shaped by the duties of a clerk-magistrate and the daily pressures of Ithtananalor.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a clerk-magistrate, and proof that strangers will not make Ithtananalor harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Clerk-Magistrate Helvar Sorn refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a clerk-magistrate too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Clerk-Magistrate Helvar Sorn can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Clerk-Magistrate Helvar Sorn adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Clerk-Magistrate Helvar Sorn always knows more about Ithtananalor than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to clerk-magistrate duties in Ithtananalor.
